title: Add multi-cycle objective decomposer
description: Decompose a high-level L5 objective into ordered, dependency-tagged single-cycle goals consumable by the plan_loader/run_cycle pipeline.

objectives.title: Design the organizer decomposer API
objectives.description: Define the function signature and output shape for apex.core.organizer.decompose_objective.

objectives.title: Implement the decomposer
objectives.description: Implement deterministic topological ordering of single-cycle goals.

objectives.title: Add an example organizer objective
objectives.description: Provide examples/plans/organizer_objective.json for manual and automated runs.

objectives.title: Test determinism and dependency ordering
objectives.description: Add tests/test_organizer.py asserting deterministic output and topological ordering.
